title: v0.18 HSP Track Prompt spec ingested and mapped. Canonical payload schema: sessi
rationale: The wire format for all track ingestion is now defined. Normalizer must handle this plus WAI Claude format. Critical for Station Master build — determines StationRecord canonical schema.
description: v0.18 HSP Track Prompt spec ingested and mapped. Canonical payload schema: session_header (codename, line_id, station_id, governance_mode), exchange (id={codename}-t{N}, user.raw, assistant.raw, events[], artifacts_referenced[]), state_snapshot (every 10 turns). Export order: FILENAME line → session_header → artifact_manifest → provenance_manifest → line/station_manifest → state_snapshot → exchanges. Ingest sources: live_session | pasted_track | uploaded_file.
decision_reason: High-impact taught pattern (wakeup/closeout/track integrity). Prioritized for delivery.
